## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (`pytest -m "not network"`)
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (or explain why not)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files committed
